_meta.expectedBranches: remortgage no additional borrowing with pension income and interest-only repayment
_meta.fieldsExercised: remortgage current balance, retired pension income, interest-only repayment
_meta.zeroResultPolicy: A zero pound result is not expected; treat as failure unless visible Results says zero.
_meta.virginMoneyAssumptions: Virgin Money residential calculator supports Purchase/Remortgage but not a separate further-advance option; further advance is represented as remortgage additional borrowing. Public self-employed fields are generic net profit fields for sole trader, partnership, LLP, and limited company. Sample 03 uses age 60, 10-year term, and pension income above 75000 to satisfy Virgin Money interest-only policy.
